_instructions: Each entry records a backlink you have placed on a third-party site (Medium, guest posts, directories, social bios, etc.).
`url` is the public page that should contain the link. `target` is the path on breakyoursolarcontract.com it should point at (use specific blog/city/state pages, not just the homepage).
Run `pnpm seo:backlinks` to fetch each url and verify the link still exists and points at the right target. Use `--no-fetch` to validate the registry offline.
Set `"status": "example"` on placeholder rows so they are skipped until you fill in a real url.
Keep this file as the single source of truth for the 34 Medium articles and any other backlinks so their value is measured instead of assumed.

backlinks.anchorHint: how to get out of a solar contract
backlinks.notes: Replace with a real published Medium article URL. Each Medium post should link to 2-3 specific pages.
